ip_outcome_note: Card name contains 'Krillin' explicitly. Depicted figure is short, stocky, bald in orange gi — Krillin's canonical visual identifiers throughout all Dragon Ball media. The card's synergy ability references 'Toughened Up Chiaotzu' (TB2-056), matching Krillin and Chiaotzu's long-standing partnership in the lore. Verified via card oracle text on product listings.

trivia_bullets.text: Toughened Up Krillin (TB2-053) is a yellow-color Common Battle card with 15,000 base power. Its skill: if Toughened Up Chiaotzu (TB2-056) is in the Battle Area, Krillin gains +5,000 power and Critical. The paired mechanic mirrors Krillin and Chiaotzu's friendship in canon — where Chiaotzu's psychic backup enabled Krillin's tournament run at the 22nd Tenkaichi Budokai.
sources: WebSearch: Big Orbit Cards TB2-053 product page
WebSearch: ARKEN DBS TCG TB2-053 listing

trivia_bullets.text: Krillin is one of only a few non-Saiyan fighters to consistently reach the semi-finals of multiple World Martial Arts Tournaments. He entered the 21st, 22nd, and 23rd Tenkaichi Budokai, reaching the semi-finals twice. His quarter-final loss to Piccolo Jr. at the 23rd is considered one of his best fights in the franchise — he was the first character after Tien and Chiaotzu to learn flight during that tournament.
sources: WebSearch: CBR 'Ranking the Best Krillin Fights from the Entire Dragon Ball Franchise'
WebSearch: CBR 'Every Martial Artist Who Fought in Dragon Ball's World Tournaments'

trivia_bullets.text: At 15,000 power for 2 yellow energy, Krillin's base stats are competitive for a Common. The Critical keyword (when inflicting life damage, the opponent places cards in Drop Area rather than hand) is a meaningful pressure tool, but it requires Chiaotzu on the field — a deliberate design constraint that punishes running Krillin without his partner.
sources: WebSearch: Carta Magica TB2-056 Chiaotzu listing

related_cards.name: Toughened Up Chiaotzu
related_cards.note: Direct mechanical partner — TB2-053 gains Critical only when TB2-056 is in play; mirrored synergy pair.

related_cards.name: Future Martial Artist Son Goku
related_cards.note: Krillin faced Goku in the 22nd Tenkaichi Budokai semi-finals; shared set and World Tournament trait.

related_cards.name: Master Roshi, Martial Meister
related_cards.note: Krillin is a student of Roshi's Turtle School; same set.
